description.zh-cn: 邮件营销：维护邮件订阅列表(含前台订阅/退订)，后台创建邮件活动(主题+富文本正文)，向全体会员或订阅者群发，复用系统邮件配置，含发送进度、退订链接与发送记录，提供 email:campaign 命令处理定时活动。
description.en: Email marketing: manage a subscriber list (front-end opt-in/out), create campaigns (subject + HTML body), broadcast to customers or subscribers via the system mailer, with progress, unsubscribe links and logs; ships an email:campaign command for scheduled sends.
